Absent-voice provocation

Source: R/provocateur.R
provoke_absent_voice.Rd

List demographic / temporal / linguistic / topical segments of the corpus that are underrepresented in the entries supporting theme X. Observational rather than evidence-based; no exact_text citations (the model is reasoning ABOUT absences, not quoting present voices). Returns Provocation objects with NULL provenance and the dimension info in the extra field.

Usage

provoke_absent_voice(
  theme_name,
  theme_entries,
  data,
  provider,
  n = 5L,
  audit_log = NULL,
  response_cache = NULL,
  fabrication_log = NULL
)

Arguments

theme_name

Character: the theme to challenge.

theme_entries

Tibble: entries the researcher believes support the theme (must have std_id and std_text).

data

Tibble: the FULL corpus (the model searches this).

provider

AIProvider object.

n

Integer: maximum provocations to return (default 5).

audit_log

Optional AuditLog.

response_cache

Optional ResponseCache.

fabrication_log

Optional FabricationLog.
